revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 26 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 26 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: robot Adding: [[zh:十月廿六]], [[zh-yue:十月廿六]]
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 3 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q840425]] に転記
1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月26日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の26日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[久寿]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1155年]][[11月22日]]） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・[[後白河天皇]]に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * [[観応]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1350年]][[11月26日]]） - [[観応の擾乱]]。将軍・[[足利尊氏]]と対立していた弟・[[足利直義|直義]]が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[天保]]9年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1838年]][[12月12日]]） - [[天理教]]開教
== 誕生日 == * [[安和]]元年（ユリウス暦[[968年]][[11月19日]]） - [[花山天皇]]、65代[[天皇]]（+ [[1008年]]） * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[11月20日]]） - [[徳川宗春]]、7代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1764年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1311年]][[12月6日]]） - [[北条貞時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]9代[[執権]]・8代[[得宗]]（* [[1271年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]]

== 誕生日 == * [[安和]]元年（ユリウス暦[[968年]][[11月19日]]） - [[花山天皇]]、65代[[天皇]]（+ [[1008年]]） * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[11月20日]]） - [[徳川宗春]]、7代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1764年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1311年]][[12月6日]]） - [[北条貞時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]9代[[執権]]・8代[[得宗]]（* [[1271年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

== Births == * [[安和]]元年（ユリウス暦[[968年]][[11月19日]]） - [[花山天皇]]、65代[[天皇]]（+ [[1008年]]） * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[11月20日]]） - [[徳川宗春]]、7代[[尾張藩]]主（+ [[1764年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応長]]元年（ユリウス暦[[1311年]][[12月6日]]） - [[北条貞時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]9代[[執権]]・8代[[得宗]]（* [[1271年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

[[sn:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}}2年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1155|ja|1155}}{{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}}に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1350|ja|1350}}{{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}}。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}}が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1838|ja|1838}}{{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}}開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}}1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}}{{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}}、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}}（+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}}） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}9年（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}}{{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}}、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}}主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}}{{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}}） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}}、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}}9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}}・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}}（* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}}）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1155|ja|1155}}{{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}}に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1350|ja|1350}}{{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}}。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}}が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}9年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1838|ja|1838}}{{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}}開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}}1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}}{{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}}、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}}（+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}}） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}9年（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}}{{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}}、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}}主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}}）

[[sn:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}}2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1155|ja|1155}}{{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}}に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}}1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}}{{ill|1350|ja|1350}}{{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}}） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}}。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}}と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}}が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}}9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}}{{ill|1838|ja|1838}}{{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}}開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}}1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}}{{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}}） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}}、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}}（+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}}） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}}9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}}{{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}}、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}}主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}}）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}}{{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}}） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}}、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}}9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}}・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}}（* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}}）

== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教

[[sn:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）

[[sn:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|後白河天皇}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|観応}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|観応の擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|足利尊氏}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|執権}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ） == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|25|10|27|9|26|11|10|1026}}

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271}} ）

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155|12=draft}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日|12=draft}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350|12=draft}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=draft}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義|12=draft}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教|12=draft}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇|12=draft}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311|12=draft}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken|12=draft}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271|12=draft}} ）
== See Also ==

== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken|12=draft|12=draft}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗|12=draft|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271|12=draft|12=draft}} ）

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar October]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 26 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:New]]
}} [[sn:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 26일]] [[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十月廿六]] [[en:draft:October 26 (Lunisolar)]] [[ar:October 26 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyushu|ja|久寿|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1155|ja|1155|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|12=draft|12=draft}} に{{要出典|date=2021-02}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平 (日本)|lt=Shōhei|lt_ja=正平|12=draft|12=draft}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1350|ja|1350|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 26|ja|11月26日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=draft|12=draft}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|12=draft|12=draft}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Naoyoshi|ja|足利直義|lt=Naoyoshi|lt_ja=直義|12=draft|12=draft}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1838|ja|1838|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|ja|天理教|12=draft|12=draft}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anwa|ja|安和|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|968|ja|968|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 19|ja|11月19日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Hanayama|ja|花山天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} （+ {{ill|1008|ja|1008|12=draft|12=draft}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|ja|Genroku|12=draft|12=draft}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|ja|1696|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Suneharu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft|12=draft}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft|12=draft}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|ja|1764|12=draft|12=draft}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|ja|1311|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|December 6|ja|12月6日|12=draft|12=draft}} ） - {{ill|Hojo Sadatoki|ja|北条貞時|12=draft|12=draft}} 、{{ill|Kamakura Shogunate|ja|鎌倉幕府|12=draft|12=draft}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|ja|Shikken|12=draft|12=draft}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|ja|得宗|12=draft|12=draft}} （* {{ill|1271|ja|1271|12=draft|12=draft}} ）

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840425]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 26|qq=October 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿六]][[zh:十月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840425]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 26|qq=October 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿六]][[zh:十月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840425]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 26|qq=October 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 26 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月26日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 26일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 26 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿六]][[zh:十月廿六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840425]] Wikidata name: 26th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 26|qq=October 26}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Events == * [[:en:Kyūju|Kyushu]] 2nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1155|1155]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/[[:en:Shōhei|Shōhei]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1350|1350]] [[:en:November 26|November 26]] ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・[[:en:Ashikaga Tadayoshi|Naoyoshi]] が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 9th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1838|1838]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ） - [[:en:Tenrikyo|Tenrikyo]] 開教
== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Births == * [[:en:Anna (era)|Anwa]] 1st year（[[:en:968|968]] [[:en:November 19|November 19]] ） - [[:en:Emperor Kazan|Emperor Hanayama]] 、65代[[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] （+ [[:en:1008|1008]] ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（[[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ） - [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Suneharu]] 、7代[[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] 主（+ [[:en:1764|1764]] ）
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:December 6|December 6]] ） - [[:en:Hōjō Sadatoki|Hojo Sadatoki]] 、[[:en:Kamakura shogunate|Kamakura Shogunate]] 9代[[:en:Shikken|Shikken]] ・8代[[:en:Tokusō|Tokusō]] （* [[:en:1271|1271]] ）

== Events == * {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|WD=Q1194205|lt=Kyushu}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1155|en|1155|WD=Q19650|lt=1155}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|WD=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|en|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|WD=Q725375|lt=Naoyoshi}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|en|Tenrikyo|WD=Q737323|lt=Tenrikyo}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anna (era)|en|Anna (era)|WD=Q1373003|lt=Anwa}} 1st year（{{ill|968|en|968|WD=Q23918|lt=968}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Kazan|en|Emperor Kazan|WD=Q361000|lt=Emperor Hanayama}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1008|en|1008|WD=Q19235|lt=1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Muneharu|en|Tokugawa Muneharu|WD=Q6636871|lt=Tokugawa Suneharu}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|WD=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|en|1764|WD=Q7659|lt=1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311}} {{ill|December 6|en|December 6|WD=Q2303|lt=December 6}} ） - {{ill|Hōjō Sadatoki|en|Hōjō Sadatoki|WD=Q3136681|lt=Hojo Sadatoki}} 、{{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|WD=Q1045904|lt=Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|en|Tokusō|WD=Q1759237|lt=Tokusō}} （* {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} ）

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 26일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 26''' is the 26th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Kyūju|en|Kyūju|WD=Q1194205|lt=Kyushu}} 2nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1155|en|1155|WD=Q19650|lt=1155}} {{ill|November 22|en|November 22|WD=Q3025|lt=November 22}} ） - 雅仁親王が即位して第77代・{{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|ja|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|WD=Q317984|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} に{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kan'ō|ja|Kan'ō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1st year/{{ill|Shōhei|en|Shōhei|WD=Q1143587|lt=Shōhei}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1350|en|1350|WD=Q6094|lt=1350}} {{ill|November 26|en|November 26|WD=Q3019|lt=November 26}} ） - {{ill|Kan'ō Disturbance|ja|Kan'ōの擾乱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kan'ō Disturbance|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 。将軍・{{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|ja|Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji|2=ja|3=足利尊氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Takauji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q297107}} と対立していた弟・{{ill|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|en|Ashikaga Tadayoshi|WD=Q725375|lt=Naoyoshi}} が、京都を脱出して挙兵 * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 9th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}} ） - {{ill|Tenrikyo|en|Tenrikyo|WD=Q737323|lt=Tenrikyo}} 開教
== Births == * {{ill|Anna (era)|en|Anna (era)|WD=Q1373003|lt=Anwa}} 1st year（{{ill|968|en|968|WD=Q23918|lt=968}} {{ill|November 19|en|November 19|WD=Q3026|lt=November 19}} ） - {{ill|Emperor Kazan|en|Emperor Kazan|WD=Q361000|lt=Emperor Hanayama}} 、65代{{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} （+ {{ill|1008|en|1008|WD=Q19235|lt=1008}} ） * {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|WD=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1325001}} 9th year（{{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ） - {{ill|Tokugawa Muneharu|en|Tokugawa Muneharu|WD=Q6636871|lt=Tokugawa Suneharu}} 、7代{{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|WD=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain}} 主（+ {{ill|1764|en|1764|WD=Q7659|lt=1764}} ）
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō}} 1st year（{{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311}} {{ill|December 6|en|December 6|WD=Q2303|lt=December 6}} ） - {{ill|Hōjō Sadatoki|en|Hōjō Sadatoki|WD=Q3136681|lt=Hojo Sadatoki}} 、{{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|WD=Q736839|lt=Kamakura Shogunate}} 9代{{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|WD=Q1045904|lt=Shikken}} ・8代{{ill|Tokusō|en|Tokusō|WD=Q1759237|lt=Tokusō}} （* {{ill|1271|en|1271|WD=Q5523|lt=1271}} ）
